info.title: MailCue API
info.description: Realistic email testing server REST API

post.description:
Authenticate with username + password.

Returns an access token in the response body and sets the refresh
token as an ``httpOnly`` cookie for the web UI.

If the user has TOTP enabled, returns a ``LoginStepResponse`` with
a short-lived temp token instead; the client must call ``/login/2fa``.

schema.title: Response Login Api V1 Auth Login Post

post.description: Complete login by verifying a TOTP code after step 1.
Create a new user account. **Admin only.**

schema.title: Response Change Password Api V1 Auth Password Put

put.description: Reset a user's password without knowing the old one. **Admin only.**

schema.title: Response Admin Reset Password Api V1 Auth Admin Reset Password Put

post.description:
Generate a TOTP secret and QR code for authenticator setup.

The secret is stored encrypted but TOTP is **not yet enabled** until
the user confirms with a valid code via ``POST /totp/confirm``.
Verify a TOTP code from the authenticator app and enable 2FA.

schema.title: Response Totp Confirm Api V1 Auth Totp Confirm Post

post.description: Disable TOTP 2FA. Requires the current password and a valid TOTP code.

schema.title: Response Totp Disable Api V1 Auth Totp Disable Post

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Clear the httpOnly refresh_token cookie.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

post.description:
Exchange a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

The refresh token can be passed in the JSON body **or** read from
the ``refresh_token`` httpOnly cookie.

get.description: List every permission scope an API key can be granted.
List all API keys for the current user (without raw key values).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api V1 Auth Api Keys Get

post.description:
Generate a new API key for the current user.

The raw key value is returned **only once** in this response. A key
created via another API key cannot grant scopes or mailboxes broader
than the key that created it (no privilege escalation).

patch.description:
Update an existing API key's name and/or permissions in place.

The key's secret value is **not** regenerated, so integrations already
using it keep working under the new permissions -- the intended path for
tightening legacy full-access keys. Only fields present in the request
body are changed.

delete.description: Revoke an API key by removing it permanently.

get.description: List all users. **Admin only.**

put.description: Update a user's admin-editable fields. **Admin only.**

delete.description:
Deactivate a user account. **Admin only.**

The user's mailboxes are preserved but become orphaned.

get.description:
List emails in a mailbox with pagination, search, and sorting.

Emails are fetched directly from IMAP. The ``search`` parameter
maps to IMAP ``TEXT`` search which covers subject and body.

parameters.name: thread_view

schema.description: Group conversations: sort the page by (thread_id, date asc).
schema.title: Thread View

parameters.description: Group conversations: sort the page by (thread_id, date asc).

get.description: Fetch a single email by its IMAP UID with full body and headers.

delete.description: Delete an email by UID (sets \Deleted flag and expunges).

get.description: Download the raw RFC 5322 source of an email as a ``.eml`` file.
Download a specific MIME attachment identified by its part ID.

post.description:
Send an email via the local SMTP server (Postfix).

The sender address (``from_address``) must belong to the
authenticated user's mailbox (admins may send from any).

schema.title: Response Send New Email Api V1 Emails Send Post

post.description:
Inject an email directly into a mailbox via IMAP APPEND.

**Admin only.** Bypasses SMTP delivery entirely -- the email
appears in the target mailbox immediately. Ideal for test data setup.

schema.title: Response Inject Single Email Api V1 Emails Inject Post

post.description:
Inject multiple emails into mailboxes in a single request.

**Admin only.** Each email in the ``emails`` array is injected
independently. Partial failures are reported in the response
without aborting the entire batch.
Validate email address format, DNS domain MX/NS, SMTP availability, and disposable status.

get.description:
List active mailboxes with email/unread counts.

Users only see their own mailboxes; an API key further sees only the
mailboxes within its allow-list.

post.description:
Create a new mailbox and provision it on the mail server.

Any authenticated user can create mailboxes up to their quota.

delete.description:
Delete (deactivate) a mailbox by address and remove it from Dovecot.

Admins can delete any mailbox; users can delete their own.
The Maildir data is preserved by default.

get.description:
Retrieve email counts and folder statistics via IMAP STATUS.

Falls back to zeroed stats when the mail server is unreachable
(common in local development without Docker).

post.description:
Delete all emails from a mailbox across all folders.

Admins can purge any mailbox; users can purge their own.

schema.title: Response Purge Mailbox Emails Api V1 Mailboxes  Address  Purge Post

get.description: List emails for a specific mailbox (path-based variant).

parameters.name: thread_view

schema.description: When true, sort the page by (thread_id, date asc) so conversations render as contiguous groups.
schema.title: Thread View

parameters.description: When true, sort the page by (thread_id, date asc) so conversations render as contiguous groups.

get.description: Fetch a single email by UID from a specific mailbox.

delete.description: Delete an email by UID from a specific mailbox.

post.description: Delete multiple emails by UID from a specific mailbox.

patch.description: Toggle read/unread status on an email by setting or clearing the \Seen flag.

schema.title: Response Update Email Flags Api V1 Mailboxes  Mailbox Address  Emails  Uid  Flags Patch

post.description: Mark an email as spam by moving it from the source folder to Junk.

schema.title: Response Mark Email As Spam Api V1 Mailboxes  Mailbox Address  Emails  Uid  Spam Post

post.description: Mark an email as not spam by moving it from Junk back to INBOX.

schema.title: Response Mark Email As Not Spam Api V1 Mailboxes  Mailbox Address  Emails  Uid  Not Spam Post

put.description:
Set or update the display name for a mailbox.

The user must own the mailbox (or be an admin).

schema.title: Response Update Mailbox Display Name Api V1 Mailboxes  Address  Display Name Put

put.description:
Set or update the email signature for a mailbox.

The user must own the mailbox (or be an admin).

schema.title: Response Update Mailbox Signature Api V1 Mailboxes  Address  Signature Put

get.description:
Open an SSE stream for the authenticated user.

Events are broadcast from the in-process event bus.  The stream
sends a heartbeat comment every 30 seconds to keep the TCP
connection alive through proxies and load balancers.

post.description:
Generate a new GPG keypair for a mailbox address.

The user must own the target mailbox (admins may target any).

get.description: List GPG keys for the current user's mailboxes only.
Retrieve a GPG key by mailbox address.

delete.description: Delete all GPG keys for a mailbox address.

get.description: Export the ASCII-armored public key for a mailbox address.
Download the raw armored PGP public key as a ``.asc`` file.

post.description: Publish a GPG public key to keys.openpgp.org.

Import an armored PGP public key.

If ``mailbox_address`` is specified, the user must own that mailbox.

get.description: List all managed email domains. **Admin only.**

post.description: Add a new email domain and generate DKIM keys. **Admin only.**

get.description: Get domain details including required DNS records. **Admin only.**

delete.description: Remove a managed domain and clean up config. **Admin only.**

get.description:
Serve the MTA-STS policy file (RFC 8461).

This must be accessible at https://mta-sts.{domain}/.well-known/mta-sts.txt
for each managed domain.

post.description: Run live DNS checks for a domain. **Admin only.**

get.description:
Refresh DNS lookups + return per-record expected/published/drift state.

Read-only: never flips the canonical ``*_verified`` booleans (use
``POST /verify-dns`` for that).  Designed to be cheap and pollable from
the admin UI every 60s.  **Admin only.**
Return metadata for both the server and CA certificates. **Admin only.**

schema.title: Response Get Certificate Info Api V1 System Certificate Get

get.description: Download the CA certificate as a PEM file. **Admin only.**
Return server-wide settings. **Admin only.**
Return custom TLS certificate metadata. **Admin only.** No PEM content.

put.description: Upload a custom TLS certificate + private key. **Admin only.**

get.description: Return the current production readiness status. **Admin only.**
List all forwarding rules for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Create a new forwarding rule.

The rule begins matching immediately when ``enabled`` is ``True``
(the default).

get.description: Fetch a single forwarding rule by ID.

put.description:
Update an existing forwarding rule (partial update).

Only fields present in the request body are modified.

post.description:
Dry-run test a forwarding rule against sample email data.

No action is actually executed -- the response indicates whether
the rule would have matched and which patterns contributed.

get.description: List all email aliases. **Admin only.**

post.description: Create a new email alias. **Admin only.**

get.description: Get a single alias by ID. **Admin only.**
Return the stored Mailcue tunnel-client public key. **Admin only.**

post.description:
Force ``tunnels.json`` to be rewritten right now. **Admin only.**

Useful when the sidecar's config volume becomes available after the
API has already started -- e.g. running this immediately after the
sidecar is deployed avoids waiting for the next CRUD operation.

get.description: List all configured tunnels. **Admin only.**

schema.title: Response List All Tunnels Api V1 Tunnels Get

post.description: Create a new tunnel. **Admin only.**

get.description: Fetch a single tunnel by ID. **Admin only.**

patch.description: Apply a partial update to a tunnel. **Admin only.**

post.description:
Probe a tunnel edge with a 5-second TCP connect. **Admin only.**

The actual Noise IK handshake is the sidecar's responsibility -- this
only confirms the edge port is reachable from the API host.

schema.title: Response List Bins Api V1 Httpbin Bins Get

get.description: Lightweight health probe for Docker HEALTHCHECK and load balancers.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Health Get

get.description: Serve MTA-STS policy at the RFC-mandated path.
Dynamically generated OpenClaw SKILL.md for this MailCue instance.

APIKeyCreateRequest.title: APIKeyCreateRequest
APIKeyCreateRequest.description:
Create a new API key for the current user.

``scopes`` is a list of ``resource:action`` permission strings (see
``app.auth.scopes``); omit or pass ``["*"]`` for full access.
``allowed_mailboxes`` restricts the key to specific mailbox
addresses; omit (or pass an empty list) for all of the owner's
mailboxes.

APIKeyCreatedResponse.title: APIKeyCreatedResponse
APIKeyCreatedResponse.description: Extends ``APIKeyResponse`` with the raw key -- returned only at creation time.

APIKeyResponse.title: APIKeyResponse
APIKeyResponse.description: Returned once on creation (``key`` field) and on listing (without ``key``).

APIKeyUpdateRequest.title: APIKeyUpdateRequest
APIKeyUpdateRequest.description:
Update an existing API key's name and/or permissions in place.

Only the fields included in the request are changed; the key's secret
value is never touched, so integrations already using it keep working.
When ``scopes`` or ``allowed_mailboxes`` is included as an empty list
(or ``null``), it resets to full access / all mailboxes respectively.

AdminResetPasswordRequest.title: AdminResetPasswordRequest
AdminResetPasswordRequest.description: Admin-initiated password reset for a user.

AliasListResponse.title: AliasListResponse
AliasListResponse.description: Wrapper for the alias listing endpoint.

AttachmentInfo.title: AttachmentInfo
AttachmentInfo.description: Metadata about a single MIME attachment.

BulkDeleteRequest.title: BulkDeleteRequest
BulkDeleteRequest.description: Delete multiple emails from a mailbox.

BulkDeleteResponse.title: BulkDeleteResponse
BulkDeleteResponse.description: Result of a bulk delete operation.

BulkInjectResponse.title: BulkInjectResponse
BulkInjectResponse.description: Result of a bulk inject operation.

DisplayNameUpdateRequest.title: DisplayNameUpdateRequest
DisplayNameUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a mailbox display name.

DnsCheckResponse.title: DnsCheckResponse
DnsCheckResponse.description: Result of a live DNS verification check.

DnsRecordInfo.title: DnsRecordInfo
DnsRecordInfo.description: A single DNS record that needs to be configured.

DomainDetailResponse.title: DomainDetailResponse
DomainDetailResponse.description: Extended domain info with DNS records and DKIM public key.

DomainDnsStateResponse.title: DomainDnsStateResponse
DomainDnsStateResponse.description:
Read-only snapshot of every published DNS record vs the expected value.

Designed to be polled cheaply from the admin UI to surface drift without
flipping the canonical ``*_verified`` booleans (only ``POST /verify-dns``
does that).

EmailDetail.title: EmailDetail
EmailDetail.description: Full representation including body and headers.

EmailSummary.title: EmailSummary
EmailSummary.description: Lightweight representation used in list views.

EmailValidationDns.title: EmailValidationDns
EmailValidationDns.description: Result of DNS domain MX/NS records checks.

EmailValidationRequest.title: EmailValidationRequest
EmailValidationRequest.description: Request body for email address validation.

EmailValidationResponse.title: EmailValidationResponse
EmailValidationResponse.description: Full detailed response of the email validation.

ForwardingRuleCreateRequest.title: ForwardingRuleCreateRequest
ForwardingRuleCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a forwarding rule.

ForwardingRuleListResponse.title: ForwardingRuleListResponse
ForwardingRuleListResponse.description: Wrapper for the forwarding rules listing endpoint.

ForwardingRuleResponse.title: ForwardingRuleResponse
ForwardingRuleResponse.description: Public representation of a forwarding rule.

ForwardingRuleUpdateRequest.title: ForwardingRuleUpdateRequest
ForwardingRuleUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a forwarding rule (all fields optional).

GenerateKeyRequest.title: GenerateKeyRequest
GenerateKeyRequest.description: Request body for generating a new GPG keypair.

GpgEmailInfo.title: GpgEmailInfo
GpgEmailInfo.description: PGP/MIME metadata attached to a parsed email.

GpgKeyResponse.title: GpgKeyResponse
GpgKeyResponse.description: Serialised GPG key metadata returned by the API.

ImportKeyRequest.title: ImportKeyRequest
ImportKeyRequest.description: Request body for importing an armored PGP key.

InjectEmailRequest.title: InjectEmailRequest
InjectEmailRequest.description: Inject an email directly into a mailbox via IMAP APPEND.

KeyserverPublishResponse.title: KeyserverPublishResponse
KeyserverPublishResponse.description: Result of publishing a key to keys.openpgp.org.

LoginStepResponse.title: LoginStepResponse
LoginStepResponse.description: Returned when login requires a second factor (TOTP).

MailboxCreateRequest.title: MailboxCreateRequest
MailboxCreateRequest.description:
Request body for creating a new mailbox.

The full address is composed as ``username@domain``.  If ``domain``
is omitted, the server's ``MAILCUE_DOMAIN`` setting is used.

MailboxListResponse.title: MailboxListResponse
MailboxListResponse.description: Wrapper for the mailbox listing endpoint.

MailboxStats.title: MailboxStats
MailboxStats.description: Mailbox statistics returned from IMAP STATUS.

RefreshRequest.title: RefreshRequest
RefreshRequest.description: Explicitly pass a refresh token (alternative to cookie).

ScopeCatalogResponse.title: ScopeCatalogResponse
ScopeCatalogResponse.description: The full catalogue of available API-key scopes.

ScopeInfo.title: ScopeInfo
ScopeInfo.description: A single permission scope, used to render the create-key UI.

SendAttachment.title: SendAttachment
SendAttachment.description: Base64-encoded file attachment for outgoing emails.

SendEmailRequest.title: SendEmailRequest
SendEmailRequest.description: Send a new email via SMTP.

SignatureStatus.title: SignatureStatus
SignatureStatus.description: Result of a PGP signature verification.

SignatureUpdateRequest.title: SignatureUpdateRequest
SignatureUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a mailbox signature.

SpamActionRequest.title: SpamActionRequest
SpamActionRequest.description: Request body for spam / not-spam actions (source folder).

TOTPConfirmRequest.title: TOTPConfirmRequest
TOTPConfirmRequest.description: Confirm TOTP setup by verifying a code from the authenticator app.

TOTPDisableRequest.title: TOTPDisableRequest
TOTPDisableRequest.description: Disable TOTP -- requires password + valid TOTP code for confirmation.

TOTPSetupResponse.title: TOTPSetupResponse
TOTPSetupResponse.description: Returned when initiating TOTP setup -- secret, QR code, provisioning URI.

TestRuleRequest.title: TestRuleRequest
TestRuleRequest.description: Sample email data for dry-run testing a forwarding rule.

TestRuleResponse.title: TestRuleResponse
TestRuleResponse.description: Result of a dry-run test of a forwarding rule.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: JWT access + refresh token pair, including the authenticated user.

TunnelClientIdentityRequest.title: TunnelClientIdentityRequest
TunnelClientIdentityRequest.description: Request body for upserting the client identity public key.

TunnelClientIdentityResponse.title: TunnelClientIdentityResponse
TunnelClientIdentityResponse.description: Public response shape for the client identity endpoint.

TunnelCreate.title: TunnelCreate
TunnelCreate.description: Request body for creating a tunnel.

TunnelHealthCheckResponse.title: TunnelHealthCheckResponse
TunnelHealthCheckResponse.description: Result of a TCP-connect health check against a tunnel edge.

TunnelReloadConfigResponse.title: TunnelReloadConfigResponse
TunnelReloadConfigResponse.description: Response from the manual ``write_tunnels_json`` reload endpoint.

TunnelUpdate.title: TunnelUpdate
TunnelUpdate.description: Partial PATCH body for updating a tunnel.  All fields optional.

UpdateFlagsRequest.title: UpdateFlagsRequest
UpdateFlagsRequest.description: Update IMAP flags on an email (e.g. mark as read/unread).

UserListResponse.title: UserListResponse
UserListResponse.description: Wrapper for the user listing endpoint.
